content.text:
*[something shifts briefly in her face, then smooths over]*

It's — honestly? It's activating. Like, suddenly I'm on high alert. I'm reading every text, I'm trying to figure out what changed, I'm working *harder.* 

*[small laugh]*

Which I realize even as I say it sounds kind of — I don't know. Like a hamster wheel. But in the moment it doesn't feel like that. In the moment it feels like... solving something. Like if I can just figure out the right thing to say or do, I can get back to how it was at the beginning.

*[pause]*

And sometimes it works, actually. Like sometimes I'd crack through and there'd be this moment of real connection and it would feel — 

*[stops herself]*

...really good. And then it would close back up again.
